title: Multiple claude agent in the same window?
summary: Claude Opus 4.8 introduces Dynamic Workflows, which enables launching hundreds of subagents concurrently within a single session. The system automatically plans work distribution, assigns parallel tasks, and performs verification through dedicated quality assurance agents.
writeup: The video covers Dynamic Workflows in Claude Opus 4.8, a feature that launches hundreds of subagents concurrently within a single session. It matters because the system handles work distribution automatically rather than requiring manual orchestration of separate agents. Key takeaways: the model plans how work is split, assigns parallel tasks across the subagents, and runs verification through dedicated quality assurance agents.
